levels.name: Safety Gate
levels.description: Execution verbs blocked. Requires Ray Review approval gate. Model not used unless drafting an approval summary.

levels.name: Meta/Status/Cost/Process/Local Facts
levels.description: Answerable from local reports, usage ledger, activity journal, capability state. Never triggers a model call.

levels.name: Live Supabase Retrieval
levels.trigger: approvals, business opportunities, clients, research rows, monetization, Ray Review, live records
levels.description: Queries authenticated Supabase tables. Falls back to static with honest labeling. Stores results in conversation memory.

levels.name: Conversation Memory / Follow-up Resolution
levels.trigger: number 3, that one, pick one, do that, how do we implement it, monthly subscription, named entity
levels.description: Resolves follow-up references from previous ranked/listed/selected items. Never asks generic clarification when memory exists.

levels.name: Local Reasoning
levels.trigger: recommend, prioritize, what should I do next, fastest money move, implementation plan, business strategy
levels.description: Local reasoning from Supabase + page context + reports + memory. Model is NOT used unless local reasoning is insufficient.

levels.name: Model Reasoning
levels.trigger: deep synthesis, polished writing, complex strategy, multi-source analysis
levels.description: Model reasoning with packed context and cost logging. Only activates when Level 4 local reasoning is insufficient.

levels.name: Approval/Action Layer
levels.trigger: create review card, prepare task, send to specialist, run dry-run, external action
levels.description: Action queued through Ray Review approval workflow. No direct execution.

routingRules.level0Overrides: Level 0 is checked first and overrides all other levels
routingRules.topicBoundaryBeforeLevel3: Safety, casual/identity, status/meta, and explicit domain classification run before Level 3 memory eligibility
routingRules.level4Before5: Level 4 (local reasoning) is tried before Level 5 (model) to minimize model usage
routingRules.modelNeverForStatus: Level 1 questions never trigger a model call
routingRules.modelNeverForCost: Cost/token questions never trigger a model call
routingRules.supabaseFirst: Level 2 always tries live Supabase before falling back to static
routingRules.memoryEligibility: Level 3 requires an explicit reference, named entity match, or clear same-domain continuation
